title: Void Singularity Hero
prompt: VOID-STAR: an inverted star collapsing into an infinite void; central singularity core glowing white-gold with radiant corona; surrounding negative space like torn velvet; neon cyan and magenta edges; crystalline archive shards orbiting in slow, deliberate motion; hyper-real detail, volumetric light, cinematic depth, photoreal + sci-fi hybrid
negative_prompt: cartoon, low-res, grain, lens-flare overexposed, text, watermark
notes: Use long exposure motion blur on orbiting shards; emphasize negative space pressure.
